name: Green Tomato Frittata
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the tomatoes into rounds about 1/2-inch thick and dredge them in cornmeal or flour.
2. Heat enough oil in a 10-inch nonstick pan to cover the surface lightly and fry the tomatoes briefly on each side, until they are lightly colored. Do not let them get soft.
3. Lightly beat the eggs with the scallions and basil, then season with salt and pepper.
4. Pour the beaten eggs over the tomatoes.
5. Let the eggs sit for about a minute, then give the pan a gentle shake to loosen the eggs from the bottom.
6. Cook over medium-low heat until the eggs are nicely colored on the bottom.
7. Slide the frittata out onto a large plate.
8. Place the pan over it, invert and return it to the heat for the other side to cook.
9. Turn the frittata out onto a serving plate and serve, hot or tepid, cut into wedges.
